title: Ireland 1990 Italia 90 World
description: Ireland 1990 Italia 90 World Cup Retro Jersey A piece of Irish football history with the Ireland 1990 Italia 90 World Cup Jersey. This iconic design, featuring the classic Opel sponsor logo and Adidas trefoil branding, is a tribute to Ireland's legendary World Cup campaign in Italy. The vibrant green with classic three stripes and tricolour collar trim captures the essence of vintage Irish football kits!

title: Ireland 1992-94 Home Retro Jersey
description: Ireland 1992-94 Home Retro Jersey Own a piece of Irish football history with the Ireland 1992-94 Home Jersey. This design, featuring the classic Opel sponsor logo and Adidas branding, is a tribute to one of Ireland's most memorable eras in international football. The striking green base with bold white diagonal stripes and tricolour collar trim captures the essence of vintage Irish football kits!

title: Ireland 1992-94 Away Retro Jersey
description: Ireland 1992-94 Away Retro Jersey A piece of Irish football history with the Ireland 1992-94 Away Jersey. This iconic design is a tribute to one of Ireland's most memorable eras in international football. Road to the World Cup USA 94 Jersey. The crisp white base with bold green diagonal stripes and tricolour collar trim captures the essence of vintage Irish football kits!

title: Ireland 1990 World Cup Away
description: Ireland 1990 World Cup Away Jersey Italia 90 Quarter Final A piece of Irish football history with this Ireland 1990 World Cup Away Jersey. This design, featuring the classic Opel sponsor logo and Adidas trefoil branding, is a lasting memory of Ireland's legendary quarter-final clash against Italy in the 1990 World Cup. The crisp white base with green accents and tricolour collar trim is pure vintage Irish football! The McGrath, Moran, and Aldridge era.

title: Ireland 1994 World Cup Home
description: Ireland 1994 World Cup Home Jersey - USA 94 Classic One of the most iconic Irish football shirts ever. The 1994 World Cup home jersey in emerald green with that brilliant bold black geometric graphic pattern, tricolour collar trim and classic. Ray Houghton wore this shirt when he lobbed Pagliuca to beat Italy at Giants Stadium, and legends like Paul McGrath, Roy Keane and John Aldridge pulled it on throughout that unforgettable USA 94 campaign.

title: Ireland 1994 World Cup Away
description: Ireland 1994 World Cup Away - USA 94 This is the Ireland away jersey from the 1994 World Cup in the USA, featuring the bold white base with three broad green stripes, classic Opel sponsor and the iconic FAI crest with adidas branding. Worn by Paul McGrath, Roy Keane, Ray Houghton and John Aldridge during one of Ireland's greatest ever tournaments.

title: Ireland 1995-96 Away Jersey
description: Ireland 1995-96 Away Jersey - Tricolour Classic Stunning IIreland 1995-96 away shirt featuring that wild tricolour-inspired design — bold green and orange vertical panels on a white base with Umbro branding and Opel sponsor. One of the most eye-catching kits of the mid-90s. Worn by Roy Keane, Denis Irwin, Andy Townsend and Paul McGrath during the Euro 96 qualifying campaign — a brilliant shirt from a generation of Irish football that punched well above its weight.

title: Ireland Euro 88 Home Jersey
description: Ireland Euro 88 Home Jersey – Classic Legendary Ireland 1988 Euro home shirt in emerald green with adidas trefoil, white/orange/white stripes and classic badge, worn at Jack Charlton's first major tournament. Seen on stars like Ray Houghton, John Aldridge and Paul McGrath during the famous 1-0 win over England and draws vs Russia and Holland. Perfect for retro outfit or anyone who loves that unforgettable Germany 88 vibe.

title: Ireland 1997-98 Away Jersey
description: Ireland 1997-98 Away Jersey - The Orange One Possibly the most talked-about Ireland kit ever made. The 1997-98 orange away shirt by Umbro with green, black and white shoulder detailing and the classic Opel sponsor - a controversial piece of Irish football history. The shirt famously debuted in a World Cup qualifier in Skopje in 1997 and was only worn a handful of times. Worn by Roy Keane, Tony Cascarino and Denis Irwin.

title: Cork City 1988-89 Retro Jersey
description: Cork City 1988/89 Retro Jersey A piece of Irish football history with the Cork City 1988-89 Home Jersey. This iconic design, featuring the classic Guinness sponsor logo, is a tribute to Cork City’s early years in Irish football.

title: Liverpool 2001 UEFA Super Cup
description: Liverpool 2001 UEFA Super Cup Away Jersey - Monaco This is the 2001-03 Reebok away jersey worn during the UEFA Super Cup in Monaco, complete with the special embroidered "UEFA Super Cup – L.F.C. – Monaco 2001" badge on the chest. Liverpool beat Bayern Munich 3-2 at the Stade Louis II on 24 August 2001, with goals from Riise, Heskey and Owen to win their second ever Super Cup - sealing an incredible five-trophy year under Gérard Houllier. Worn by Michael Owen, Steven Gerrard, Sami Hyypiä and John Arne Riise on one of the greatest nights in modern Liverpool history.

title: Dublin Away Jersey
description: Dublin Away Jersey. Perfect New condition. Player fit (more body hugging fit.). Ribbed crewneck. Stripe detail on the sleeves. Colours: Sky Blue / Navy / White. Depictions of the historical landmarks Ha’penny Bridge, the Lady Liberty and the Five Lamps are illustrated throughout the jersey. The Dublin GAA crest is a simple and elegant representation of the county’s Viking heritage, symbolised through the Raven and the Longboat. It also features the three burning castles that have been the symbol of Dublin since 1230AD.

title: Liverpool 1993-95 Home Jersey
description: Liverpool 1993-95 Home Jersey - an early 90s Anfield classic from the Adidas Equipment era. Iconic red base with signature white and green contrast trim on collar and cuffs, the classic Carlsberg sponsor, and the famous Liverpool FC crest. 1994-95 League Cup winning season. Worn by Rush, Fowler, McManaman and Redknapp during one of Liverpool's most memorable early Premier League campaigns.

title: Manchester United 2012-13 Away Jersey
description: Manchester United 2012-13 Away Jersey - Fergie's Final Title. 2012/13 Premier League Champions. Clean white base with iconic red and black Henley collar, subtle gingham pattern detail on the sleeve cuffs, embroidered Manchester United crest and Nike swoosh, classic AON sponsor and "Forged in Industry, Striving for Glory" inner neck tribute. Van Persie, Rooney, Giggs, Scholes era. The shirt worn during Sir Alex Ferguson's legendary final season at Old Trafford.

title: Arsenal 1992-94 Home Jersey
description: Arsenal 1992-94 Home Jersey - The Cup Double. 1992/93 FA Cup & League Cup Winners. Iconic red body with classic white sleeves, featuring the vintage JVC sponsor era, classic wrap-around white collar with red and navy trim, Arsenal shield crest and Adidas Equipment logo. Wright, Adams, Merson, Parlour era. One of the most beloved home designs of the early 90s.
